recommendations.title: Saint Omer

recommendations.title: Before and After
recommendations.overview: Two parents deal with the effects when their son is accused of murdering his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: The Long Goodbye
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Hollywood, Detective Philip Marlowe tries to help a friend who is accused of murdering his wife.

recommendations.title: 12 Angry Men
recommendations.overview: The defense and the prosecution have rested and the jury is filing into the jury room to decide if a young Spanish-American is guilty or innocent of murdering his father. What begins as an open and shut case soon becomes a mini-drama of each of the j

recommendations.title: Nuts
recommendations.overview: A high-class call girl accused of murder fights for the right to stand trial rather than be declared mentally incompetent.

recommendations.title: The Crime Is Mine
recommendations.overview: In 1930s Paris, Madeleine, a pretty, young, penniless, and talentless actress, is accused of murdering a famous producer. Helped by her best friend, Pauline, a young, unemployed lawyer, she is acquitted on the grounds of self-defense. A new life of f

recommendations.title: A Time to Kill
recommendations.overview: A young lawyer defends a black man accused of murdering two white men who raped his 10-year-old daughter, sparking a rebirth of the KKK.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: Conviction
recommendations.overview: Ever since she served on the jury during his trial, Nora has been convinced that Jacques Viguier is innocent, despite him being accused of murdering his wife. Following an appeal by the public prosecutor’s office, and fearing a miscarriage of justice
